description: A resident needs to schedule a special pickup for a large item, like an old mattress.

nodes.task_description: Identify the resident's address and the type of bulk item to be collected.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the necessary details for the pickup.

nodes.task_description: Check the schedule for bulk item collection and find the next available date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the next available pickup date for the resident's area.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the pickup and provide the resident with instructions on where and when to place the item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the pickup and gives clear instructions to the resident.
